title: gladiolus saundersii
intro: Gladiolus saundersii, also known as the red sword lily or New Zealand sword lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Gladiolus saundersii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to aid in wound healing and reduce pain.
